name: Коллегия Танца
description: Bards of the College of Dance know that the Words of Creation can't be contained within speech or song; the words are uttered by the movements of celestial bodies and flow through the motions of the smallest creatures. These Bards practice a way of being in harmony with the whirling cosmos that emphasizes agility, speed, and grace.
shortDescription: Move in Harmony with the Cosmos

features.name: Dazzling Footwork
features.description: While you aren't wearing armor or wielding a {@item Shield|XPHB}, you gain the following benefits.

details.danceVirtuoso: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on any Charisma ({@skill Performance}) check you make that involves dancing.
details.unarmoredDefense: Your base {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB} equals 10 plus your Dexterity and Charisma modifiers.
details.agileStrikes: When you expend a use of your Bardic Inspiration as part of an action, a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, or a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}, you can make one {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} as part of that action, {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}.
details.bardicDamage: You can use Dexterity instead of Strength for the attack rolls of your Unarmed Strikes. When you deal damage with an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to a roll of your Bardic Inspiration die plus your Dexterity modifier, instead of the strike's normal damage. This roll doesn't expend the die.
